name: Grade 3 Mathematics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 3 pathway for equivalent fractions, perimeter, measurement, and mathematical explanations. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 3 knowledge and transferable skills in equivalent fractions, perimeter, measurement, and mathematical explanations.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
